action_set_definitions.name: get_plant_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time sensor data from the wastewater treatment plant, including influent flow, oxygen levels, biomass concentration (MLSS), ammonia concentration, and chemical storage levels.

action_set_definitions.name: set_aeration_setpoint
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the target dissolved oxygen (DO) concentration in the biological reactor to facilitate nitrification.

do_target_mg_L.description: The target concentration of dissolved oxygen in mg/L. Optimal range for this task is 1.8 to 2.6 mg/L.

action_set_definitions.name: set_sludge_recycle_rate
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the return activated sludge (RAS) flow rate to maintain the biomass (MLSS) concentration in the aeration tank.

recycle_rate_m3_h.description: The flow rate for returning sludge from the clarifier to the reactor in cubic meters per hour.

action_set_definitions.name: set_chemical_dosing_rate
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the dosage rate of phosphorus-precipitating chemicals to manage the storage tank level while meeting effluent requirements.

dosing_rate_liters_h.description: The amount of chemical to be injected per hour.

state_description.influent_flow_rate: The current rate of wastewater entering the plant in cubic meters per hour.
state_description.dissolved_oxygen_mg_L: Concentration of oxygen dissolved in the aeration tank, critical for microbial activity.
state_description.mixed_liquor_suspended_solids_mg_L: Concentration of suspended solids (biomass) in the aeration tank (MLSS).
state_description.internal_ammonia_concentration: Current concentration of Ammonia (NH3-N) within the biological reactor.
state_description.sludge_recycle_rate: Rate at which settled sludge is returned from the clarifier to the aeration tank.
state_description.chemical_tank_level_percent: The remaining percentage of phosphorus-precipitating chemicals in the storage tank.
